title: Ratapani Tiger Reserve
tagline: Ratapani Tiger Reserve — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Ratapani Tiger Reserve a tiger reserve in the Raisen district of Madhya Pradesh in central India.
overview.description: Ratapani Tiger Reserve a tiger reserve in the Raisen district of Madhya Pradesh in central India. It has been a wildlife sanctuary since 1976 and was declared as a tiger reserve in 2024.

topPlaces.name: Shankar Garhi
topPlaces.description: Shankargarhi is a village located near Bajna in the district of Mathura, Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Barkheda, Raisen
topPlaces.description: Barkheda is a village in the Obedullaganj block of the Raisen District of Madhya Pradesh, India. Alternative English spellings of its name include Bharkada and Barkhera.

topPlaces.name: Bineka, Bhopal
topPlaces.description: Bineka is a village in the Bhopal district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is located in the Berasia tehsil.

items.note: Shankargarhi is a village located near Bajna in the district of Mathura, Uttar Pradesh, India.
Barkheda is a village in the Obedullaganj block of the Raisen District of Madhya Pradesh, India. Alternative English spellings of its name include Bharkada and Barkhera.
Bineka is a village in the Bhopal district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is located in the Berasia tehsil.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ratapani Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ratapani Tiger Reserve is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ratapani Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Itarsi Junction (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ratapani Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ratapani Tiger Reserve at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ratapani Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: Stays in Ratapani Tiger Reserve start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ratapani Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shankar Garhi, Barkheda, Raisen, Bineka, Bhopal.
